name: DocForge
tagline: Edit, merge, split, compress, sign, and convert PDFs without the bloated desktop app. Professional document tools, completely free.
metaDescription: DocForge is a free PDF toolkit that replaces Adobe Acrobat. Edit, merge, split, compress, convert, and e-sign PDFs right in your browser. No subscription, no watermarks.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📄</text></svg>

features.title: PDF Editing
features.desc: Edit text, images, and links directly inside any PDF. Add annotations, highlights, and comments without converting to another format first.

features.title: Merge & Split
features.desc: Combine multiple PDFs into a single file or extract specific pages into separate documents. Drag-and-drop page reordering makes it effortless.

features.title: Compress & Optimize
features.desc: Shrink PDF file sizes by up to 90% without visible quality loss. Optimized compression algorithms preserve text clarity and image fidelity.

features.title: E-Signatures
features.desc: Draw, type, or upload your signature and apply it to any PDF. Send documents for counter-signatures with built-in tracking and audit trails.

features.title: Format Conversion
features.desc: Convert PDFs to and from Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images, and HTML. Preserves formatting, tables, and embedded media during conversion.

features.title: Security & Redaction
features.desc: Password-protect PDFs, set permissions for printing and copying, and permanently redact sensitive information with certified removal.

includes: Full PDF text and image editing
Image to PDF and PDF to image
